This is the most important ask I have ever made of you. Trump’s donors rushed him $250 MILLION to help him reclaim power. I need a historic response -- 30,000 gifts before midnight -- to protect my Democrats and make Trump’s plan BACKFIRE. >> secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210528_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30&amount=15

| Dear Patriot, my family is in shock. This week, a Left-wing militant sent a package to my house with a picture of a gun to my head, and an unidentified white powder inside. I know the perils of being in the public spotlight, but this incident truly made me fear for my safety -- and the safety of my family. **I've been targeted a shocking number of times by Left-wing militants.** *** In 2017, I was at the Congressional baseball practice where a socialist gunman tried to wipe out dozens of Republican Congressmen. *** Later that year, a neighbor of mine launched a vicious assault that left me with half of my lung needing to be removed -- and it nearly ended up being far worse than that. *** Last year, a bloodthirsty BLM mob surrounded me on the streets of Washington, D.C., and I was fortunate to escape just in time. And how have Left-wing activists responded to these savage attacks? They have cheered. And they've vowed that more attacks are on their way. Only days before this latest attack on my family, a former pop musician named Richard Marx praised my neighbor on Twitter for his bloody assault which nearly incapacitated me. Needless to say, I've had some difficult conversations with my family about these events that have transpired. They understand the danger that we are all in. They know what the Left wants to happen to us. But we have one message to share with these Leftist militants who are attempting to do us harm: WE WILL NOT BE INTIMIDATED! I was elected to the United States Senate for one critical reason: to preserve the blessings of Liberty that our Founding Fathers bestowed on us. This is an opportunity for all of us to rise up and send a message in unison that we will not let the socialist left scare us into submission. Will you send your support today and show that violence will not intimidate us? [A contribution of $100, $50, $25, or even $10 will send that message loud and clear.](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2BlR2U7omAhGtUUZGUazUSv34vrsZhsMFPmr4rYFmgJaABun4Nz8z198ra83JqyrUpCm4FwPpYQ3DWLIWLk-2Fxv73ngcNUzY4zJCcRCAcL7eOrHXKoyM00SdCdqSD79hWixApROneEzOF3NXldQMp-2BykwGSO_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7oi-2BwPtIgpyI23-2FeKepV-2FLueP82ersxA73Hy-2B6N5Bval36luX5t3gzXqcz-2FzBOhCTFdKHOSn2u3nJmG9X2Duf6c3qj0uGV0NWanpDpcmQiCQiDxMP7NOGFI3Seq-2F53zYxsOEsYx75vygxJMv6AxHjUVcK7NV2Knp7kfsTvfxHZok40FxfI0fNg4MPhd3fIaaH5Cu6vf8u2M4YgIakkhlEkGO5GR3VXV-2FgLXZKckzzQf097FFz1Fq92RIMMtiUJuXzB9VTc-2BcRbTk1pjmbqYCUPCrgaVMy42qC-2FsS37V8jGdS-2FFq5ajfgXM-2BH9GITa9s38VzMXys9gf3Am9tpS9gAo8A-3D-3D) Political violence is what happens in third-world countries, like Afghanistan, Syria, or the Sudan. We've seen political violence in parts of Eastern Europe, such as Kosovo, and in Latin American countries such as Nicaragua and Venezuela. But did you ever think you'd see this type of political violence in the United States? This violent Left-wing movement is unprecedented. And if we allow them to intimidate us into submission, then the future that lies ahead for our country is terrifying. So I'm not backing down. And I'm not giving up on my mission of fighting for American Liberty. And neither should you. This mission is bigger than any of us. It's a fight for the soul of America. I need your support like never before, not only because my life has been threatened, but because America is in crisis. [Please show your support for my family, and stand with me. Any contribution is appreciated, but if you could chip in $100, $50, $25, or even $10 it would mean the world to me.](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2BlR2U7omAhGtUUZGUazUSv34vrsZhsMFPmr4rYFmgJaABun4Nz8z198ra83JqyrUpCm4FwPpYQ3DWLIWLk-2Fxv73ngcNUzY4zJCcRCAcL7eOrHXKoyM00SdCdqSD79hWixApROneEzOF3NXldQMp-2Byk4-mQ_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7oi-2BwPtIgpyI23-2FeKepV-2FLueP82ersxA73Hy-2B6N5Bval36luX5t3gzXqcz-2FzBOhCTFdKHOSn2u3nJmG9X2Duf6c3qj0uGV0NWanpDpcmQiCQiDxMP7NOGFI3Seq-2F53zYxsOEsYx75vygxJMv6AxHjUb6K3QIOW8G6SQACcTmCdA-2BAGOTOU4OrT-2FHAjcXzTmrvIe-2F-2Fe6ZKWGYd29DmMVG1HC5EbFm58naTCsSITLyt10x-2FTDZIYxj7xvLA2mm6KY2jYhRYEyzDgzzes22UbxXhq5RJ4XpND6sDkCw-2FAgQsAGKGhMmIKC9x6MeGKAnzA8CEZSpuTmCeCxQaO2oSQwHJjA-3D-3D) I will not back down in the face of violence. In Liberty, Rand Paul

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, my family is in shock. This week, a Left-wing militant sent a package to my house with a picture of a gun to my head, and an unidentified white powder inside. I know the perils of being in the public spotlight, but this incident truly made me fear for my safety -- and the safety of my family. I've been targeted a shocking number of times by Left-wing militants. * In 2017, I was at the Congressional baseball practice where a socialist gunman tried to wipe out dozens of Republican Congressmen. Later that year, a neighbor of mine launched a vicious assault that left me with half of my lung needing to be removed -- and it nearly ended up being far worse than that. Last year, a bloodthirsty BLM mob surrounded me on the streets of Washington, D.C., and I was fortunate to escape just in time. And how have Left-wing activists responded to these savage attacks? They have cheered. And they've vowed that more attacks are on their way. Only days before this latest attack on my family, a former pop musician named Richard Marx praised my neighbor on Twitter for his bloody assault which nearly incapacitated me. Needless to say, I've had some difficult conversations with my family about these events that have transpired. They understand the danger that we are all in. They know what the Left wants to happen to us. But we have one message to share with these Leftist militants who are attempting to do us harm: WE WILL NOT BE INTIMIDATED! I was elected to the United States Senate for one critical reason: to preserve the blessings of Liberty that our Founding Fathers bestowed on us. This is an opportunity for all of us to rise up and send a message in unison that we will not let the socialist left scare us into submission. Will you send your support today and show that violence will not intimidate us? Political violence is what happens in third-world countries, like Afghanistan, Syria, or the Sudan. We've seen political violence in parts of Eastern Europe, such as Kosovo, and in Latin American countries such as Nicaragua and Venezuela. But did you ever think you'd see this type of political violence in the United States? This violent Left-wing movement is unprecedented. And if we allow them to intimidate us into submission, then the future that lies ahead for our country is terrifying. So I'm not backing down. And I'm not giving up on my mission of fighting for American Liberty. And neither should you. This mission is bigger than any of us. It's a fight for the soul of America. I need your support like never before, not only because my life has been threatened, but because America is in crisis. I will not back down in the face of violence. In Liberty, Rand Paul | | ** Senator Rand Paul (R-KY) P.S. As you may have heard, my life has been threatened yet again. A package was sent to my house with a picture of a gun pressed against my head, and an unidentified white powder inside. Left-wing militants have threatened my life over and over again. It's clear what their ultimate goal is. I've talked to my family, and they told me loud and clear: DO NOT BE INTIMIDATED! So not only am I not backing down, I'm doubling down on my fight for American Liberty. | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate | No longer want to receive these emails? . RANDPAC PO Box 72598 Newport, Kentucky 41072

body:
Just a few hours left.

| Friend, We wanted to make sure you got Jay's email from earlier today. Since we haven't been legally able to fundraise since December, May's official fundraising deadline is an important one -- and one we've also cut short due to the holiday weekend. We don't want to bother you while you're spending time with your loved ones! That means our deadline is TONIGHT at midnight. The progress made during this legislative session was the culmination of years of building a broad and deep grassroots network of contributions -- financial and otherwise -- from supporters like you, and we can't let up now. **[If you'd like to keep making progress on climate, fixing our upside-down tax system, and more, please continue to support Jay and this critical work. Many of you know this, but it bears repeating: During the legally mandated fundraising freeze, we didn't raise a dime from December through the end of April, while Washington state's legislature was in session.
During that time, we proved the power of the movement we've built together. Together, we realized one of the most historic, progressive sessions Washington, or any state for that matter, has ever seen.
Now, session is over, and we've got some catching up to do to keep our progress (on climate, economic justice, and so much more) moving full steam ahead.

A lot's changed since the last time we had an official fundraising deadline: President Joe Biden moved into the White House. More than 165 million Americans have received at least one dose against COVID-19 (we've administered over 4.2 million first doses here in Washington state). And here in Washington state, we achieved concrete policy wins that we've been working toward for years. Things like:
* Passing the Climate Commitment Act and Clean Fuel Standard to cut carbon emissions and create new, local jobs in clean energy
* Passing a capital gains tax to make our regressive tax system fairer
* Putting more money in the pockets of working families by funding the Working Families Tax Credit

This historic legislative session showed how much we can accomplish when we work together. But we still have so much progress left to make -- and just because session is over doesn't mean that we can rest! If we are going to recover better, we must all continue pushing for progress.
**[So today, I'm asking: Will you rush a donation before our official May fundraising deadline (today!) to keep building progress and this movement alongside me?](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/mPwjhRv3NyB-/NFlmQkRHRDdtaW9FZnpwRUR0ZlBNUE8rdVVkT05hbTh5Z2FUTHJKdXZDbk1GMmhUVU9xSXBZVERLWjRwa09RcDlWK2F2amxBem95MG04akRncnZaMWZaU2YvejBCeVlDUVAxejNYMTZuVlU9S0/VHVBQy8yNlFYSkFwQ3JEb0FsQ1FnSzZGSEgweEx4bVQyR0k4TGRBcVRaaz0S1)**
Thank you for contributing to our profound progress these last few years -- and for whatever you're able to give to keep it going.
Very truly yours,
Jay

clean_body: Just a few hours left. | Friend, We wanted to make sure you got Jay's email from earlier today. Since we haven't been legally able to fundraise since December, May's official fundraising deadline is an important one -- and one we've also cut short due to the holiday weekend. We don't want to bother you while you're spending time with your loved ones! That means our deadline is TONIGHT at midnight. The progress made during this legislative session was the culmination of years of building a broad and deep grassroots network of contributions -- financial and otherwise -- from supporters like you, and we can't let up now. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thanks so much, Team Inslee \---- Forwarded message ---- From: Jay Inslee Date: Fri, May 28, 2021 Subject: We've got some catching up to do Friend, Many of you know this, but it bears repeating: During the legally mandated fundraising freeze, we didn't raise a dime from December through the end of April, while Washington state's legislature was in session. body:
TRUMP: MY SUPPORTERS WILL BE “HAPPY” WITH MY 2024 DECISION

This is the most important ask I have ever made of you. Trump just vowed to run for President if Republicans unseat my Democratic Majority. And his donors rushed him $250 MILLION to do it. I need a historic response -- 13,000 gifts before my End of Month Deadline -- to protect my Democrats and make Trump’s plan BACKFIRE. Will you chip in before midnight to ensure we keep the majority firmly in Democrats’ hands? >>secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210528_em_fr_b3_pelosi_30_rs&amount=15
This is a critical choice.

-- We can either let Trump shovel millions to Republicans, steal our Majority, and barge back into power...

-- Or we can rise up, send a historic response, and show Trump he will NEVER take the House from us.

Trump just hinged his entire Presidential run on reclaiming the House.

I will fight with everything I have to defend it from his grasp.

But I can’t do it alone -- not when he’s armed Republicans with $250 MILLION to defeat us.

Can I count on your $15 before my End of Month deadline?

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.
As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.

clean_body: Gavin Newsom has lost the confidence of the people of California. ** . == Friend, Gavin Newsom has lost the confidence of the people of California.He has lost the confidence of the very people whom he is supposed to be serving. What 's happened so far? 🏠 Home prices are skyrocketing 💰 California is suffering billions of dollars of fraud and wasted taxpayer money ✈️ Employers are leaving California for states like Florida and Texas Clearly something has to change quickly: Gov. Newsom needs to be recalled if we're going to save California from his recklessness. But to make this happen, we need to hear from the people of California: == SHOULD GAVIN NEWSOM BE RECALLED? | == == ==** The people of California cannot wait any longer. body:

Democrats want no other state more than my very own, Missouri.

Conservative,

Democrats want no other state more than my very own, Missouri. More and more radical Democrats are choosing to run against me with the support of woke elitists from California, New York, and DC. Democrats are more eager than ever to come in and flip Missouri BLUE in 2022.

**They 're raising MILLIONS to come into our state and turn Missouri into the next Georgia.** They want to make our state another socialist paradise like California or Oregon. We CAN'T let that happen. body:
Will you commit to joining me in this fight to take back the House right NOW? Failure to step up puts victory on the line.

************

Susan is in a toss-up race, and keeping this seat blue will be a challenge, especially if we don’t meet each and every goal we set. = | = | = Thank you for being part of this movement, Team Wild | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States Susan Wild represents Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress. She believes we can grow overall economic prosperity while still caring for the vulnerable members of our community. And she knows, now more than ever, it's working-class families that deserve a break in this economy — not big city billionaires and wealthy corporations. But she needs your support today -- her campaign runs on grassroots donations since she's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. = | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, **. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. body:
I'm coming to you in confidence, and I hope you won't share this
message with anyone:

Peter,

Chairman Tom Emmer, here. I lead House Republicans' mission to
take back the House for Conservatives!

I'm coming to you in confidence, and I hope you won't share this
message with anyone:

In JUST 3 days, we are having a special election in New Mexico's
First Congressional District. This district has been in the
pocket of the National Democrats for years. We've been working to
flip this seat from BLUE to RED... but things are looking a
little too close for comfort.
We need IMMEDIATE resources to hold this seat for America First
Conservatives.
(https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/special-election-fund/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210529_PSM-AR.101460_chairman-emmer_t1066846-573&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=PSM-AR.101460&utm_content=20210529_confidential-message-we-have-a-special-election-in-3-days...this-race-a-lot-tighter-than-we-thought)

Fellow Conservative, can we count on you to chip in?

Join the Special Election Victory Fund
https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/special-election-fund/
(https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/special-election-fund/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210529_PSM-AR.101460_chairman-emmer_t1066846-573&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=PSM-AR.101460&utm_content=20210529_confidential-message-we-have-a-special-election-in-3-days...this-race-a-lot-tighter-than-we-thought)
Your personalized link closes in 1 hr.
Nancy Pelosi's majority in the House of Representatives is
SLIMMER than EVER! That's why we have to seize every opportunity
to flip as MANY seats as possible for House Conservatives.

We must take back the House. There's nothing more important, and
it's the TOP PRIORITY for every Republican in Congress.

Join the Special Election Victory Fund
https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/special-election-fund/
(https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/special-election-fund/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210529_PSM-AR.101460_chairman-emmer_t1066846-573&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=PSM-AR.101460&utm_content=20210529_confidential-message-we-have-a-special-election-in-3-days...this-race-a-lot-tighter-than-we-thought)
Your personalized link closes in 1 hr.
You know what taking back the House means. It means:
* The Squad's Radical Leftist policies NEVER pass out of the
House
* President Trump's legacy remains intact
* Our America First agenda is protected

Please chip in to help win this seat and TAKE BACK THE HOUSE.
(https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/special-election-fund/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210529_PSM-AR.101460_chairman-emmer_t1066846-573&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=PSM-AR.101460&utm_content=20210529_confidential-message-we-have-a-special-election-in-3-days...this-race-a-lot-tighter-than-we-thought)

Tom Emmer

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. body:
As a former Police Chief, Rep. Val Demmings should know better.

clean_body: | | | | | | | = | | | | = | | | Friend — We'd much rather share good news, but right now, the facts aren't good. Congressional Republicans have overtaken us in digital fundraising. We have to act now to protect our battleground seat! = = | | = = | = = Ever since Ron first ran to represent the working families of Wisconsin in Congress, our dedicated grassroots supporters have been critical to Team Kind's ability to go toe-to-toe with the Republican attack machine and win. If you're with us now, we'll get back on track and make sure we can continue moving our state and communities forward. But this current surge in fundraising by the GOP and their allies has put us behind! = | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | | | = = | = = | | | = = | = = | | | | Whether it’s protecting health care and defeating the pandemic, standing up for our farmers and working families, or making sure our economy works for everyone, we can and will get it done, but only if we fight for it. Now is one of those moments when we have to take a stand together. Thank you for standing with us when it matters most. Friend,

subject: It’s a shame

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29949543/288007997/-272948131?refcode=MTH_em_20210529_X_FR_EOM_X_ACT_US_all_all_EOM_MTH_v3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2UxZmVkYy04ZGMwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2FLTwy0QeFmSX6FPl7we_5tWFu50sWmCjPQvDEn9crM=&emci=58433236-8ac0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=77e1fedc-8dc0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)

Hello, **Here’s what I was elected to do:** fight to make a real difference for New Mexico’s workers and families. **Here’s what I _wasn’t_ elected to do:** watch as policy after policy gets filibustered by Senate Republicans. But our broken Senate procedures and partisan politics require far too much of the latter. And that’s a shame, because the Senate should be fully engaged fighting for the solutions that Americans are counting on _right now_ — like ensuring equal pay for women, creating plenty of good-paying, clean-energy jobs, making sure our public lands continue to be enjoyed for generations to come. Thankfully, in my time as a U.S. Senator I’ve been able to navigate Senate procedure and politics to accomplish a lot. But there’s still so much more we need to do. I know I’ll be able to stay focused on our shared priorities because of folks like you willing to chip in whatever makes sense for their budget. **So, as our campaign quickly approaches our end-of-month deadline, will you pitch in $10 or whatever you’re able to give? Your donations give our campaign the steady backing it needs so I can focus on what I was elected to do.** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29949546/288008000/333614831?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=MTH_em_20210529_X_FR_EOM_X_ACT_US_all_all_EOM_MTH_v3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2UxZmVkYy04ZGMwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2FLTwy0QeFmSX6FPl7we_5tWFu50sWmCjPQvDEn9crM=) | [$25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29949549/288008003/333614831?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=MTH_em_20210529_X_FR_EOM_X_ACT_US_all_all_EOM_MTH_v3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2UxZmVkYy04ZGMwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2FLTwy0QeFmSX6FPl7we_5tWFu50sWmCjPQvDEn9crM=)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: I am a threat to the Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
%%=v(@sFirstName)=%%, I'm doing everything possible to protect the American Dream.
|
---
| | | Friend, I'm doing everything possible to protect the American Dream.

My parents fled Cuba, and now, I'm standing up to communist countries and defending America from socialism. Every day, I do what I can to protect the U.S. from Communist China. China is preying on us. They know our weaknesses, brought on by National Democrats, and see them as opportunities.

I also am here every day fighting for the forgotten men and women of this country. You should be keeping more in your paycheck every month, and you shouldn't have to compete with other countries for a good job.

I've seen the value of hard work. Growing up as the son of an immigrant bartender, attending college, working my way through school, and dedicating my life to public service... each part of my life has taught me to fight for you and the American Dream.

**This is why the Left hates me so much. Because I am living, breathing proof that the Democrats ' socialist agenda is oppressive and does not work to lift people out of poverty.

I have a major May Deadline coming up in just 2 DAYS, and I need your help reaching my May Goal so that together, we can defend the American Dream and show Democrats that Americans of all backgrounds oppose socialism.**

---
| | [DONATE TO OUR MAY GOAL >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lcuubzXSUe9yXdhGqfdnu2EMuAzKbqG76QuIISOsfo8-46EbQxpzt5b5U3ToEa3O-XivVd3nUKPlnlRFliPQQBWWDwP0UpJygDFCoUCAq1eUqtvlf8aOp-wsdybY1Z1eb9oYFLD2J0mqJpeqikKPkQS4BTmzn6y59FKoR50uTN0mDFWzX7CzQPi1t1quTwIHTzThqNudoBAib-Gr2eGjmXleyNlg1PwQlRYTmTRRgvGe09pMA6n9MACq02Xron1N_AVnJiZGRYQ4FUy8ESPBPw0q0_7TvTze15KyB2RLnah65AfCKmEzCp-jd5yqLw6fCTqiayKieuzuNCGfkD4wpSwgnUfV1YrtMP7QuD8PrujQXgt_Fy5UbwdqV12egrBIaOk-9fe_RlyQyGzWH1OYSkvttzAOSrJ5buybV8GRrRfvLGu2QBXjRw==&c=7YGiV_EygjT3kKvVZGoEoixrzoSBAP21LI-_hr7txoT1wuSa7C2I0w==&ch=5IE_IGkH8uBdm12wbaEdaLMOEKYq9KjhKSTg_fQtKm-v96huAjN8cQ== "DONATE TO OUR MAY GOAL >>")
---

The Radical Left sees me as a threat because I prove them wrong and because they know I support and build off of the successes of the Trump administration. President Trump paved a way for so much good change for our country, and I am here to show them that we can continue to build off those successes.

**Together, you, me, and President Trump can: **
* Stand up to "woke" corporations that cancel conservatives yet partner with Communist China
* Call out the liberal media for crediting Biden for the rapid development and distribution of life saving COVID vaccines
* Protect your 2nd Amendment rights
* Counter and stay ahead of Communist China
* Defend Ron DeSantis' bill to make our elections more secure and make sure your vote is safe
* Fight for veterans who honorably served our nation
* Lower your taxes
* And so much more...

The Left is trying to protect their narrative that relying on the government is the only way to make it out of poverty and into the middle-class. I am proof that is just not true, which is why the Left is trying their best to defeat me.
**Will you stand with us today?_[I need you to stand with President Trump and me before my major End of Month deadline.>>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lcuubzXSUe9yXdhGqfdnu2EMuAzKbqG76QuIISOsfo8-46EbQxpzt5b5U3ToEa3O-XivVd3nUKPlnlRFliPQQBWWDwP0UpJygDFCoUCAq1eUqtvlf8aOp-wsdybY1Z1eb9oYFLD2J0mqJpeqikKPkQS4BTmzn6y59FKoR50uTN0mDFWzX7CzQPi1t1quTwIHTzThqNudoBAib-Gr2eGjmXleyNlg1PwQlRYTmTRRgvGe09pMA6n9MACq02Xron1N_AVnJiZGRYQ4FUy8ESPBPw0q0_7TvTze15KyB2RLnah65AfCKmEzCp-jd5yqLw6fCTqiayKieuzuNCGfkD4wpSwgnUfV1YrtMP7QuD8PrujQXgt_Fy5UbwdqV12egrBIaOk-9fe_RlyQyGzWH1OYSkvttzAOSrJ5buybV8GRrRfvLGu2QBXjRw==&c=7YGiV_EygjT3kKvVZGoEoixrzoSBAP21LI-_hr7txoT1wuSa7C2I0w==&ch=5IE_IGkH8uBdm12wbaEdaLMOEKYq9KjhKSTg_fQtKm-v96huAjN8cQ== "I need you to stand with President Trump and me before my major End of Month deadline. >>>")_**
Thank you for doing your part to defend the American Dream. Like I mentioned, my team has a huge End of Month deadline, and with the holiday weekend falling so close to the deadline, we are all very anxious to meet this goal. _**[Could you chip in $22 today to help my team cross the finish line?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lcuubzXSUe9yXdhGqfdnu2EMuAzKbqG76QuIISOsfo8-46EbQxpzt5b5U3ToEa3O-XivVd3nUKPlnlRFliPQQBWWDwP0UpJygDFCoUCAq1eUqtvlf8aOp-wsdybY1Z1eb9oYFLD2J0mqJpeqikKPkQS4BTmzn6y59FKoR50uTN0mDFWzX7CzQPi1t1quTwIHTzThqNudoBAib-Gr2eGjmXleyNlg1PwQlRYTmTRRgvGe09pMA6n9MACq02Xron1N_AVnJiZGRYQ4FUy8ESPBPw0q0_7TvTze15KyB2RLnah65AfCKmEzCp-jd5yqLw6fCTqiayKieuzuNCGfkD4wpSwgnUfV1YrtMP7QuD8PrujQXgt_Fy5UbwdqV12egrBIaOk-9fe_RlyQyGzWH1OYSkvttzAOSrJ5buybV8GRrRexj6jADnWeZ_3NcI8SiIb0whxKlixPpP9uViqikYCHgw==&c=7YGiV_EygjT3kKvVZGoEoixrzoSBAP21LI-_hr7txoT1wuSa7C2I0w==&ch=5IE_IGkH8uBdm12wbaEdaLMOEKYq9KjhKSTg_fQtKm-v96huAjN8cQ== "Could you chip in $22 today to help my team cross the finish line?")**_

Thank you,
Marco Rubio

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Re: he stakes are still too high for us not to worry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McMorris Rodgers Win The Future Fund
body:
I'm reaching out on behalf of my colleague, Cathy McMorris Rodgers
Friend,

I'm reaching out on behalf of my colleague, Cathy McMorris Rodgers, to ask for your help. She is up against a tight fundraising deadline and she is still behind on her goal for the month.

Despite all of our top critics' expectations, we've continued to fend off political attacks from Democrats in battleground districts.

| Peter,
This is breaking news: the U.S. Military has come under fire after it was discovered that they plan to spy on the social media accounts of service members.
Current military leaders have spoken to Big Tech firms about combing through social media accounts of soldiers on the hunt for "extremist content."
Space Force Commander Matthew Lohmier was even FIRED for speaking out against the destructive ideologies of Marxism and Critical Race Theory!
We all know what this really is - they're trying to continue their woke purge of anyone who dissents from their mainstream agenda!

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: I don't want to imagine what they'll do if they get control next year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

January 6th was a dark day for our democracy. Armed rioters stormed the Capitol building, wounded and killed several Capitol police officers, and tried to overthrow the results of a free and fair election.

We all saw these events play out on live television, so there shouldn't be any discrepancy about what happened. And there shouldn't be a single one of us who isn't committed to ensuring it _never_ happens again.

Yet 175 U.S. House Republicans -- including the House Minority Leader -- just voted against creating an independent commission to investigate the January 6th attack.

**We cannot risk handing the House majority over to folks who are unable to accept the truth and unwilling to defend our democracy.**

**[I'm doing everything I can to defend the House majority next year, but I need your help. Can I count on you to chip in $5 to ensure we have the resources we need to protect the Democratic House majority?](https://act.myngp.com/el/4NCso4kVh08TNZnY6amYQKsI7c1VgpGzIhoymry3qO0=/dp3CBzdwsQ3rkAnjtL2R1IM-xouMKv_m70IiifWl0jA=?gpsid=50_115_19123&refcode=em21_210529_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210529_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

Look, it's not just voting against the January 6th commission, Peter. In recent weeks, they've ousted Liz Cheney for refusing to support The Big Lie, made outrageous claims about January 6th, spread conspiracy theories about the election and a global pandemic, and so much more. **I don 't even want to imagine what these folks would do if they regained control of the House of Representatives.**

**[Will you help me ensure Democrats maintain control of the House next year? Chip in $5 to ensure I have the resources I need to defend this seat -- and the Democratic House majority.](https://act.myngp.com/el/4NCso4kVh08TNZnY6amYQKsI7c1VgpGzIhoymry3qO0=/dp3CBzdwsQ3rkAnjtL2R1IM-xouMKv_m70IiifWl0jA=?gpsid=50_115_19123&refcode=em21_210529_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210529_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

It's about the power of hard work, the importance of owning what it means to be Arizonan and fighting for the future you deserve. It's about our movement to elect the _only immigrant governor_ in the country – and everything we can accomplish when we lead with inclusion and compassion.

If we've learned anything about Republican extremists in the past few years, it's that they'll twist almost any fact or story to make it work for their agenda. That's why, in this video, I'm telling my own story – _our_ story – in my own words and making our vision as clear as I can.
**We _can_ improve health care, education and our state economy. We _can_ make big, inclusive change. We _can_ flip Arizona blue – Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight confirms it. In fact, failed GOP politicians like Doug Ducey and our new Trump-obsessed opponent know it, too. That's exactly why they're getting ready to spend MILLIONS to defeat us. **
**So right now, I need your help to turn our incredible potential into real results. clean_body: will you take a second to watch? | | | = Friend, my campaign just released our newest video, and I'm so excited for you to hear the true story behind our movement to flip Arizona blue. It's about the power of hard work, the importance of owning what it means to be Arizonan and fighting for the future you deserve. It's about our movement to elect the only immigrant governor in the country – and everything we can accomplish when we lead with inclusion and compassion. = = If we've learned anything about Republican extremists in the past few years, it's that they'll twist almost any fact or story to make it work for their agenda. That's why, in this video, I'm telling my own story – our story – in my own words and making our vision as clear as I can. We can improve health care, education and our state economy. We can make big, inclusive change. We can flip Arizona blue – Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight confirms it. In fact, failed GOP politicians like Doug Ducey and our new Trump-obsessed opponent know it, too. That's exactly why they're getting ready to spend MILLIONS to defeat us. So right now, I need your help to turn our incredible potential into real results. Support has been pouring in from across the nation, but I'm personally counting on you to step up now:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Gracias por todo,_ Marco | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Marco Lopez for Governor PO Box 34672 Phoenix, AZ 85067 United States | | 2021 | Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Somebody is spending a lot of money in our district to keep prescription drug prices high
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/PjPwqzdfNKIwVxGZkoClcaBI6WS0R3TnggUFB4BwQeE=/OHfWuoifeMYoDLh5t6UWkQ3BP6n2O0zXWfV7AwfTZLY=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210529-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

For the second time this month, national special interest groups have launched TV ads in our congressional district. The target of their ominous ads and anger --besides me -- is H.R. 3, the "Lower Prescription Drug Costs Now Act".

H.R. 3 is the bill that would give Medicare the ability to negotiate its prescription drug prices, which it is currently prohibited from doing, unlike the Veterans Administration which can negotiate prices.

H.R. 3 would make the negotiated rates available to all Americans with private insurance, saving the hard-earned money of the people I represent -- who at times are choosing between filling their prescriptions and buying groceries.

The nonpartisan CBO estimates the bill would save taxpayers $500 billion over the next ten years, which the bill proposes reinvesting in Medicare benefits, combating the opioid crisis, and supporting community health centers in rural communities like the one I serve.

I believe competition in the marketplace is a good thing, and clearly many of my colleagues agree because H.R. 3 passed last Congress with bipartisan support.

So who would hate a bill that delivers such common-sense results and cost savings to taxpayers enough to run more than a hundred thousand dollars worth of attack ads in my district?

The same special interests that will continue spending dollar after dollar attacking me and my work to lower prescription drug prices from now until election day 2022.

We have a long road to go and many attacks yet to weather. [_**Will you support me today with a contribution to our campaign?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/PjPwqzdfNKIwVxGZkoClcaBI6WS0R3TnggUFB4BwQeE=/OHfWuoifeMYoDLh5t6UWkQ3BP6n2O0zXWfV7AwfTZLY=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210529-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/PjPwqzdfNKIwVxGZkoClcaBI6WS0R3TnggUFB4BwQeE=/OHfWuoifeMYoDLh5t6UWkQ3BP6n2O0zXWfV7AwfTZLY=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210529-1-EM&amount=25)
---
Thank you,

Abigail Spanberger

| | [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/PjPwqzdfNKIwVxGZkoClcaBI6WS0R3TnggUFB4BwQeE=/OHfWuoifeMYoDLh5t6UWkQ3BP6n2O0zXWfV7AwfTZLY=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210529-1-EM&amount=25)

---

---

PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/PjPwqzdfNKIwVxGZkoClcaBI6WS0R3TnggUFB4BwQeE=/5qvqe9A8qolfSyN1ugNKotzm7TpnElt9vGw3cvMARZs=).

name: Team Malcolm
subject: without these emails, we wouldn't have a chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Hey —
We know it's a long weekend, and we've emailed you a few times already about our deadline.
**But the truth is, without these emails, we wouldn't have a chance at sending Malcolm to the U.S. Senate to fight for working families. Please let us explain.**
As you know, Malcolm is not taking a cent from corporate PACs — grassroots donations from everyday people power our campaign.
But here's something you may not know: The vast majority of those grassroots donations come in response to emails like this one.
Those donations give us resources to reach folks from all 67 of Pennsylvania's counties. They’re crucial to growing our movement for a democracy that works for working people.

| In major news, Superior Court Judge Brian Amero recently ruled that absentee ballots in Fulton County may be unsealed and examined for possible fraud. Greater Georgia strongly [supports](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015jYetYJ3RbvxJGKz0BLNSSfTkZgA8IRUXyVraHZ7tbxtXYdVcKySa5XSQpAuIEVoUcSi8rXfCHsYXZpo8sbiYE-3ioIJos0HJ8MdoYfoki4oECXpgY732DfrZC33RticQhrkNJX15XCbzaagSf_eQGFRZRceYhZxhd6BbUNHn-aAv_fFlICTDrt7D64iU2deTJYpSm4zyOtxmGXA6tkUDAbjbq-SDhgdVmIh2quhKV9-fDtOKGGX4e2NP4g2doBf&c=ENCkdVwVZW0RoB-ugQ-7eHIsyVCE3zhbcR4JNk3DyztAnXHWgrb6Xw==&ch=1JVTMj97VKC0zIvGNTXipjhiH32SWIPZXkSxQUCFcA04Xvqt7aNUTw==&jrc=1) this ruling and was [one of the first voices](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015jYetYJ3RbvxJGKz0BLNSSfTkZgA8IRUXyVraHZ7tbxtXYdVcKySa83LiAdk_kBhHuCNXuBfuyTuspb9xvovGJqi5UrsYLPNftB86hdATUurQ4JY7cEYW84qKxOvsUVESkG_vBml9kcz_28AfZXDYJG_Is5BhUAjz_J2rsyvBvPGUUAlzioXadr1WHI4qIGcXnf9LsJYUT1f39k7Y0qRCkqBYhax79pSVAQ6H9iwrF4dYbRh3Uh6fw==&c=ENCkdVwVZW0RoB-ugQ-7eHIsyVCE3zhbcR4JNk3DyztAnXHWgrb6Xw==&ch=1JVTMj97VKC0zIvGNTXipjhiH32SWIPZXkSxQUCFcA04Xvqt7aNUTw==&jrc=1) to call for such a review in March. We believe that this inspection is a helpful step in restoring transparency, accountability, and voter confidence in our election system.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015jYetYJ3RbvxJGKz0BLNSSfTkZgA8IRUXyVraHZ7tbxtXYdVcKySa5XSQpAuIEVo7jUjcgQHcbcsiCPwg3goEGSs3dPWKVTUA3z78UWL_8kAO8wfesKDQH4O7neb5ZDov3naBIAzneAA9CyfxvX8rBfN0Wg8CHKlZEqWSDmLY2qBkP4UbRUwpZENZl9j04Bg9H0SXJsYWlEMIC96TX41oSVJLUL2DdnBEuC49mNqAFUB3VNDSDgDiklS1-q_kwN8bsetJ-ggAwI=&c=ENCkdVwVZW0RoB-ugQ-7eHIsyVCE3zhbcR4JNk3DyztAnXHWgrb6Xw==&ch=1JVTMj97VKC0zIvGNTXipjhiH32SWIPZXkSxQUCFcA04Xvqt7aNUTw==&jrc=1) or the screenshot below to learn more:

| VOTING FOR THE STATE HOUSE DISTRICT 34 SPECIAL ELECTION IS UNDERWAY.
Early voting for this election has already begun, so make sure to GET OUT AND VOTE. Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015jYetYJ3RbvxJGKz0BLNSSfTkZgA8IRUXyVraHZ7tbxtXYdVcKySa1dZeCW2xSOATa_rM06dpyO6EQ2jGJgxeQkWOLXiD77zvDx-0Kx9hcWMrMT6-auvnpOI9HcSkm0Nu1iqb1eM-Is=&c=ENCkdVwVZW0RoB-ugQ-7eHIsyVCE3zhbcR4JNk3DyztAnXHWgrb6Xw==&ch=1JVTMj97VKC0zIvGNTXipjhiH32SWIPZXkSxQUCFcA04Xvqt7aNUTw==&jrc=1) to find your polling location.
Greater Georgia is [working](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015jYetYJ3RbvxJGKz0BLNSSfTkZgA8IRUXyVraHZ7tbxtXYdVcKySa_lPd1SnK_BFLDkyt8Ypxc77s_rshko7Nh8Gj-5C8IAqGzVtXuekU46sxs7dZkp1v3MybX_apgWRlj8YOKqs-WeMfxEFDONJsVG51w-RUNTZb5pWijhIDA6w0SEVPTaXS4L81cGstlQ6UB7-ncSq3mpjvAMwOWVTFXOEFEPiBE0JBtNoXtPmDhkWPIMY-a8mjdS2_L4d_6xms5F2agqoEX4kZ1d2eZaXeKFYGipQAJxk206odhUeqdP79r2Pg9_JYA==&c=ENCkdVwVZW0RoB-ugQ-7eHIsyVCE3zhbcR4JNk3DyztAnXHWgrb6Xw==&ch=1JVTMj97VKC0zIvGNTXipjhiH32SWIPZXkSxQUCFcA04Xvqt7aNUTw==&jrc=1) overtime to secure a win for pro-growth values. So far, we have connected with thousands of voters via door-knocking, phone-banking, texting, and traditional mail. We worked to register a wave of new voters, and now we are focused on turning out our base and connecting with as many people as possible.
If you would like to help us keep this seat RED, we are hosting a [Day of Action for HD34](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015jYetYJ3RbvxJGKz0BLNSSfTkZgA8IRUXyVraHZ7tbxtXYdVcKySa1dZeCW2xSOA5SUZlRoHHOguC7mXwXBpZnQBnsh6zISY0cgzJp9lBXWtNocKqehxweVRMHk2gI4BVrRhTgCNTMiLSUfE315FTJgvn-CEZB9ibRtb62n_AB_TyteC6KsuPTeEBXJ-BA_g37I-CjNp6M_4SvDf4l8Wpw==&c=ENCkdVwVZW0RoB-ugQ-7eHIsyVCE3zhbcR4JNk3DyztAnXHWgrb6Xw==&ch=1JVTMj97VKC0zIvGNTXipjhiH32SWIPZXkSxQUCFcA04Xvqt7aNUTw==&jrc=1) - and we need your help! Join Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler and our Field Team on June 5 at the Cobb County GOP Headquarters as we show you how to canvass your neighbors, break for lunch, then deploy into local neighborhoods. Lunch and breakfast are provided. Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015jYetYJ3RbvxJGKz0BLNSSfTkZgA8IRUXyVraHZ7tbxtXYdVcKySa1dZeCW2xSOA5SUZlRoHHOguC7mXwXBpZnQBnsh6zISY0cgzJp9lBXWtNocKqehxweVRMHk2gI4BVrRhTgCNTMiLSUfE315FTJgvn-CEZB9ibRtb62n_AB_TyteC6KsuPTeEBXJ-BA_g37I-CjNp6M_4SvDf4l8Wpw==&c=ENCkdVwVZW0RoB-ugQ-7eHIsyVCE3zhbcR4JNk3DyztAnXHWgrb6Xw==&ch=1JVTMj97VKC0zIvGNTXipjhiH32SWIPZXkSxQUCFcA04Xvqt7aNUTw==&jrc=1) to RSVP.
KEY DATES:
* Advance, in-person early voting begins: Monday, May 24
* Election Day: Tuesday, June 15

To sign up to volunteer and get involved in Greater Georgia's effort ahead of this election, visit [www.greatergeorgia.com/volunteer](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015jYetYJ3RbvxJGKz0BLNSSfTkZgA8IRUXyVraHZ7tbxtXYdVcKySa82IBkHHbgzHVR2hB6oXweoNgg-dlcERwBaHHtFF6CIKElqXUdx5EpHSTo2Qr-4r8W5nLpucj2NDr4sd-HgTeE89EptOl1WGLOo_VUphi23oQ45FjKroP00=&c=ENCkdVwVZW0RoB-ugQ-7eHIsyVCE3zhbcR4JNk3DyztAnXHWgrb6Xw==&ch=1JVTMj97VKC0zIvGNTXipjhiH32SWIPZXkSxQUCFcA04Xvqt7aNUTw==&jrc=1).
To learn more about the special election for State House District 34, click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015jYetYJ3RbvxJGKz0BLNSSfTkZgA8IRUXyVraHZ7tbxtXYdVcKySa82IBkHHbgzHDeAe9We-g9jzq_QKmakrdKKdClw-mjbve3TrTH6Y9nkr3fpkY1Cdk6g7lY2aBrnfZYOwBGRNWpHaMNELfEe6Q8PcV003iRJt2cooBYx0nV2rlgdJvLzBVBZ21CjBt7tABn_4Gf5jIZY=&c=ENCkdVwVZW0RoB-ugQ-7eHIsyVCE3zhbcR4JNk3DyztAnXHWgrb6Xw==&ch=1JVTMj97VKC0zIvGNTXipjhiH32SWIPZXkSxQUCFcA04Xvqt7aNUTw==&jrc=1).

Greater Georgia strongly this ruling and was to call for such a review in March. We believe that this inspection is a helpful step in restoring transparency, accountability, and voter confidence in our election system. Click or the screenshot below to learn more: | | | | | VOTING FOR THE STATE HOUSE DISTRICT 34 SPECIAL ELECTION IS UNDERWAY. Early voting for this election has already begun, so make sure to GET OUT AND VOTE. Click to find your polling location. Greater Georgia is overtime to secure a win for pro-growth values. So far, we have connected with thousands of voters via door-knocking, phone-banking, texting, and traditional mail. We worked to register a wave of new voters, and now we are focused on turning out our base and connecting with as many people as possible. If you would like to help us keep this seat RED, we are hosting a - and we need your help! We all know the people we’re up against. They represent the wealthy and powerful, unconnected to the needs and best interests of the people of Wisconsin — just take a look at Ron Johnson’s latest headline-making comments:

“Sen. Ron Johnson Doesn't Care If Your Wages Don't Cover Childcare. 'The Marketplace' Has Spoken”
---

Ron Johnson argued that wages are rising too quickly, that child care isn’t an issue for workers, and all workers should be forced off the federal unemployment subsidy. _He has proven time and time again he will never understand the struggles of working class Wisconsinites._

**We’re a people-powered grassroots campaign.** We have a grassroots army that is ready to take on the billionaires and millionaires. Now is the time to PROVE IT to our opponents and all who doubt us.

[Chip in now to help us prove ourselves ahead of our May 31st deadline >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29956879/288039351/1814808395?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210526_1_1&refcode2=469c6bb9-a0c0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjljNmJiOS1hMGMwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nQulUL9nigKqIryxWwwzngpqHnS2xFLBboU_vk4LK4Q=)

Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. clean_body: | | Friend, Even though our election is still a year away, it doesn't mean that we don’t have critical deadlines that we must meet. May 31st is our end-of-month deadline, and we need to show strong grassroots support to keep pace with our multi-millionaire and billionaire opponents. While my opponents can rely on self-funding or their millionaire friends on Wall Street, I rely on you. Or I’ll have another garage sale to raise money to fund our campaign. However, I’m running out of stuff to sell. = = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = We all know the people we’re up against. They represent the wealthy and powerful, unconnected to the needs and best interests of the people of Wisconsin — just take a look at Ron Johnson’s latest headline-making comments: “Sen. Ron Johnson Doesn't Care If Your Wages Don't Cover Childcare. 'The Marketplace' Has Spoken” Ron Johnson argued that wages are rising too quickly, that child care isn’t an issue for workers, and all workers should be forced off the federal unemployment subsidy. He has proven time and time again he will never understand the struggles of working class Wisconsinites. We’re a people-powered grassroots campaign. We have a grassroots army that is ready to take on the billionaires and millionaires. Now is the time to PROVE IT to our opponents and all who doubt us. = | = Thank you for your continued support and dedication, Tom | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin Nelson for Wisconsin PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**

body:
This week's updates from Joe Kent (Candidate for WA-03) | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
####
# **Joe Kent
Highlights 23-29 May 2021**
---
|
**Upcoming Events & Media:

Monday, 31 May - Co-hosting Steve Bannon's War Room - [view here](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=78c28cb3e6&e=00856e661d)
Thursday, 3 Jun 6pm-8pm- Lewis County Meet & Greet, **Pathway Church of God** ** 1416 S Scheuber Rd #9018, Centralia, WA 98531
**Saturday, 26 June, Fundraiser, **Click link for details and tickets **[26 June Event Tickets](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=1bb6731b79&e=00856e661d)
Sunday, 27 June, Fundraiser, **Click link for details and tickets** [27 June Event Tickets](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=f7b9f1817d&e=00856e661d)

This Week's Events/Clips:**

**Tuesday, 25 May - **Joined Patriot Prayer and parents to protest in Washougal against vaccines in schools, CRT, and Planned Parenthood. [pic1](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=01564d69da&e=00856e661d) ,
** **[Live Video about BLM/Antifa and Free Palestine Movement](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=caa85143ac&e=00856e661d) , [Meet and Greet at Rocky's Pizza (pic)](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=e7b6fd6c66&e=00856e661d)
**Wednesday, 26 May** - [Live Video from Ridgefield High Protest](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=6778fb33ef&e=00856e661d) , [Protest pic1](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=ea20391e2e&e=00856e661d) , [Private Event: Biden's ATF Pick (video)](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=d126e94e9e&e=00856e661d) , [Dept of Education (video)](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=66835addc6&e=00856e661d) , [Regime Change Wars (video)](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=1179888104&e=00856e661d)
**Friday, 28 May -**[Alderbrook "Cruise-In" pic](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=fb7f97034b&e=00856e661d)

**Volunteer Updates:**
**Want to Volunteer? Sign up[here](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=cbd8db4ad7&e=00856e661d)!

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
During this holiday weekend, my team and I will be reaching out to you with some important requests. Can I have a minute to explain why they are so important?
Our organization is doing our part every day to make our communities safer from gun violence.
We successfully helped pass a universal background checks bill through the House. We’ve worked with the Biden administration to make gun safety a top priority. And now, we’re focused on passing universal background checks in the Senate, too.
And the truth is we need a lot of resources to do our part. But what you may not know is that the overwhelming majority of the donations we receive come from lots and lots of people like you giving small amounts of money.
Most of those donations come in response to emails just like this. These emails really are so important to the work we do. So please, allow me to ask:
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation today to help us hit our 10,000 donation May fundraising goal? Your support, regardless of the amount, will go a long way towards helping us save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21&amount=3&refcode=em210529-1-subs?t=1&refcode2=152_3935704_2ZeSnt&akid=152%2E3935704%2E2ZeSnt)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210529-1-subs&t=14&refcode2=152_3935704_2ZeSnt&akid=152%2E3935704%2E2ZeSnt)**

****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210529-1-subs&t=18&refcode2=152_3935704_2ZeSnt&akid=152%2E3935704%2E2ZeSnt)**

| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210529-1-subs&t=19&refcode2=152_3935704_2ZeSnt&akid=152%2E3935704%2E2ZeSnt)**

****
Your support means everything to us here at Giffords. With your help, we can continue the fight to pass universal background checks in the Senate so that as more Americans gather with their friends and loved ones, they can feel safe.
Every donation makes a difference, so thank you for pitching in and keeping up the fight with us.
My very best,
Gabby Giffords

name: Jonathan Schleifer
subject: They’ll do anything to block real change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Fairness Project
body:
Can you help us fight back?

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29959286/288047277/-591528114?refcode=em0529_espyrestdonors&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzNkZDQ2Ny1hOGMwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHJ3bbkabSYDUzcrr6ZqDXcu8ccwaAIa7MfSpKou3H4=) Hi team, Our team at The Fairness Project runs ballot initiative campaigns to **win real change directly at the ballot box when out-of-touch politicians refuse to act**. But now, those same out-of-touch politicians are trying to take away democratic ballot initiatives precisely because they work to win real change. _The New York Times reported that just this year there are 144 bills attacking ballot initiatives in 32 states._ **They’re attacking us because they want to block change. They’d rather squash democracy than help those in need. It’s one of the worst attacks on our democracy I’ve ever seen.** We’re ready to fight back, but need your help to get it done. **[Please, can you rush a contribution today to help us fight back and keep winning in the face of these anti-democratic attacks?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29959287/288047278/-591528114?refcode=em0529_espyrestdonors&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzNkZDQ2Ny1hOGMwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHJ3bbkabSYDUzcrr6ZqDXcu8ccwaAIa7MfSpKou3H4=)** | **[Contribute →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29959288/288047279/-591528114?refcode=em0529_espyrestdonors&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzNkZDQ2Ny1hOGMwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHJ3bbkabSYDUzcrr6ZqDXcu8ccwaAIa7MfSpKou3H4=)**
---
Here are just a few examples of just how outlandish these attacks are:
* Only letting folks collect signatures during the cold winter months
* Increasing the threshold to win ballot initiatives -- in Florida, you need 60% to win instead of a simple majority!
* Requiring signatures to be collected on petitions the size of beach towels... no joke!
* Increasing the number of signatures required to get on the ballot

We’ve been able to win real change in red states by going directly to the voters.
**But now, after they’ve seen our wins, they’re changing the rules.**
We’re going to keep fighting back, launching new ballot initiative campaigns, and organizing for real change -- because too many people still need health care or a raise. But we need you by our side.
**[Please, donate today to help us fight back against these cruel, anti-democratic attacks and help us win more campaigns to raise wages and expand health care.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29959289/288047280/-591528114?refcode=em0529_espyrestdonors&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzNkZDQ2Ny1hOGMwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHJ3bbkabSYDUzcrr6ZqDXcu8ccwaAIa7MfSpKou3H4=)**
Thanks so much, we’re so grateful for your support,
Jonathan Schleifer
Executive Director, The Fairness Project
**[Contribute →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29959290/288047281/-591528114?refcode=em0529_espyrestdonors&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzNkZDQ2Ny1hOGMwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHJ3bbkabSYDUzcrr6ZqDXcu8ccwaAIa7MfSpKou3H4=)**
---

Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, [unsubscribe](https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/d42d3283-00c0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/d33dd467-a8c0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzNkZDQ2Ny1hOGMwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHJ3bbkabSYDUzcrr6ZqDXcu8ccwaAIa7MfSpKou3H4=&id=102101357). 2300 18th St NW #21337

clean_body: Can you help us fight back? | = Hi team, Our team at The Fairness Project runs ballot initiative campaigns to win real change directly at the ballot box when out-of-touch politicians refuse to act. But now, those same out-of-touch politicians are trying to take away democratic ballot initiatives precisely because they work to win real change. The New York Times reported that just this year there are 144 bills attacking ballot initiatives in 32 states. They’re attacking us because they want to block change. They’d rather squash democracy than help those in need. It’s one of the worst attacks on our democracy I’ve ever seen. We’re ready to fight back, but need your help to get it done. = | = Here are just a few examples of just how outlandish these attacks are: Only letting folks collect signatures during the cold winter months Increasing the threshold to win ballot initiatives -- in Florida, you need 60% to win instead of a simple majority! Requiring signatures to be collected on petitions the size of beach towels... no joke! Increasing the number of signatures required to get on the ballot We’ve been able to win real change in red states by going directly to the voters. But now, after they’ve seen our wins, they’re changing the rules. We’re going to keep fighting back, launching new ballot initiative campaigns, and organizing for real change -- because too many people still need health care or a raise. But we need you by our side. = Thanks so much, we’re so grateful for your support, Jonathan Schleifer Executive Director, The Fairness Project = Paid for by The Fairness Project. Thank you for supporting The Fairness Project. Your unwavering support helps us bring economic fairness to millions of Americans and put power directly in the hands of voters through ballot initiatives. The Fairness Project has won 20 ballot initiatives since 2016, changing the lives of nearly 18 million people by raising the minimum wage, expanding access to health care, capping payday lending, and winning paid leave. And we're just getting started. If you would like more ways to keep in touch and stay involved, please consider following us on and . Your partnership allows us to make all this possible. If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts, please =. Funds raised will be used to support ballot measures, on-the-ground efforts, and other advocacy activities in support of working families. Contributions or gifts to The Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to The Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at The Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, . 2300 18th St NW #21337 Washington, DC 20009

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Organizing in 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Our ability to win progressive change is more powerful than it’s been in years.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210529-2143-header&t=1&akid=2143%2E2526796%2EreYjwT)
Our ability to win progressive change is more powerful than it’s been in years. But the truth is that in order to win key legislation and deliver tangible relief to working people, it will require organizing just as hard as we did to win in 2020.
Year after year, organizing is treated as something that is a uniquely electoral exercise. And the problem is that if we are only organizing for elections, we're not going to win the world that we need.
We cannot slow down in 2021. Our campaign is currently investing in keeping organizing staff on the ground, continuing volunteer work year-round, and building momentum for our progressive movement across the country.
This work requires real resources — but right now, we're coming up just short of our end-of-month goal and we need to raise 15,000 more grassroots contributions before the May deadline.
[Team AOC is combining community support, deep canvassing, and issue advocacy to win the systemic changes we need. Will you invest $3 to help those efforts be as powerful as possible, and help us meet our goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210529?refcode=em20210529-2143-P&t=2&refcode2=2143_2526796_reYjwT&akid=2143%2E2526796%2EreYjwT)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210529?refcode=em20210529-2143-P&t=3&refcode2=2143_2526796_reYjwT&akid=2143%2E2526796%2EreYjwT)**
_Based on our average contribution, we need to hit at least 15,000 more contributions to stay on track. We’re 70% of the way there. Every contribution, no matter how much, helps us meet this crucial target._
We’ve already seen what’s possible when our movement rises up together this year. For example, President Biden has called for an increase in the minimum wage to $15/hour and included Green New Deal principles in his infrastructure plan.
Make no mistake, these are our victories. But with more pressure we can achieve bolder investments in our country’s infrastructure, achieve student debt relief, reimagine our immigration system, and so much more.
**This policial moment is a critical opportunity that we cannot waste.** If we can build enough progressive momentum for critical solutions for our systemic crises, we can pass real policies to help repair and restore justice. But funding this work takes a lot of grassroots power, and we can’t afford to lose momentum.
[Will you donate today to help us fuel this fight and reach our end-of-month goal of 15,000 more contributions?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210529?refcode=em20210529-2143-P&t=4&refcode2=2143_2526796_reYjwT&akid=2143%2E2526796%2EreYjwT)
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210529?refcode=em20210529-2143-P&t=5&refcode2=2143_2526796_reYjwT&akid=2143%2E2526796%2EreYjwT)**
---

Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

We’ll get right to it, everyone: The GOP only needs to flip ONE seat to take back the majority. And given that just yesterday, they blocked a bill that would create an independent commission into the January 6 insurrection, we absolutely need to hold the line. Pundits say that Senator Hassan’s seat is one of the most likely to flip (she won her last race by just 1,017 votes!), and we’re still $13,577 short of our May goal. **[You’re a top Democrat and after what the GOP did yesterday, Maggie really needs YOUR help. Will you rush $5 or more to stand up to Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell and keep this seat in Democratic hands? body:
Peter -- we wanted to give you a quick update on our May end-of-month fundraising goal, and we wish we had better news to share.

Right now, we're not where we need to be if we're going to hit our $15,000 goal by midnight tomorrow. As of 8 a.m. CT this morning, we're still coming up $6,297 short. [**Will you rush a donation of $27.40 -- our average online donation -- to help us get back on track?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29960905/288052868/-49048448?gpsid=50_130_19077&refcode=em21_210529_EOM5_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210529_EOM5_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzI1YjQxNi1iMGMwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AUOtW6BN5bkg7WK6IwgvVeZnV0dhEvcQh3YUP5kJJMo=)

**Dan Patrick is all hat and no cattle.** There, I said it, folks. Over the past month, Texas Republicans came out in full force with one horrific bill after another. From cutting off unemployment benefits for struggling Texans to allowing people to buy guns without a license or permit, none of these policies do anything to help Texans make ends meet or pave the way for a better future. name: Team Sara Jacobs
subject: before the May deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress

And Democrats are facing a critical choice in this final stretch:

-- We can either ignore this race, let Republicans flip this Democratic seat red, and dangerously shrink our House Majority.

-- Or we can have one of the biggest Democratic fundraising surges EVER to DEFEND this seat and show Republicans we’ll PROTECT our Majority. Nancy’s critical End of Month Deadline is only 48 hours away. Can we count on your $15 in these final hours? >> secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210529_em_fr_b3_pelosi_30&amount=5

This is a make-or-break moment.

Republicans cannot be on a path to retake our House Majority -- AND boost Trump’s run for President.

The stakes are simply too high to let Republicans outraise us.

Will you rush $15 in the next 48 hours to help Democrats WIN and PROTECT our Majority?

name: David Schweikert
subject: They're denying the crisis
body:
Friend, you and I both know the federal government has a duty to secure our border and enforce immigration laws. And in Arizona, securing our borders is especially crucial. But the Democrats refuse to do their job. You may already be familiar with me, but I’ll reintroduce myself – I’m David Schweikert, and I’m staying committed to making sure Arizona’s border is secured – once and for all. **[Which is why I hope you will continue to be a part of Team Schweikert and help me fight illegal immigration and push back on the Biden-Harris administration with a generous donation to my campaign today?](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=af7120946d8b4da1857594472d860a12&_m=c6644f80f3bc4a98bdde44f92e0e54ef&_e=0MT-PIf3jPix4LYT_VBYN1VfscP54aMsc69Qqup39n8n4cmr4MZKZTmzjWGra2OZWg7Mdo374TYx-Py2eReiBpEWuo6xTwMaZfzPt19hWNomG6OyNKMwXrFKlwa4Y-Vp-d8pHZg8ZfXS7lyykFi4b4ukv9cNgHtMOTNHmrfFJqNnApS0TQp5urLv7OE02OOm7GDpWXCr4spIPT_QmUJ4Uok8yfeEi48qPoKWBD62CKLzCaxK77dSnh7KtAFT8PnzOYlifjuq2b25grWgAODgvbG3RXz6PXmjz6UJ2viKsR9UMsxg_GfBUIc4JDfim8dDSmKSmRZOLPLPqF09NN_uoye1r4QdoRO0c9HQ6SXxwKw%3D) ** The Biden-Harris administration has destroyed our border, eroded safety in our communities, and damaged our economy by opening the floodgates to millions of illegal immigrants. And not to mention Kamala Harris is the one _“overseeing the border crisis”_ – even AFTER she openly pushed decriminalizing illegal crossings and open-door policies. **The liberal media even admitted that the Department of Homeland Security under the Biden-Harris administration is granting 9 out of 10 illegal aliens entry to the United States. ** But you see, that statistic doesn’t account for the other THOUSANDS crossing our border undetected and unreported. **[Friend, we can’t sit back and let the Democrats destroy our country – that’s why I hope you’ll join me today with a donation of $15 or more.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=af7120946d8b4da1857594472d860a12&_m=c6644f80f3bc4a98bdde44f92e0e54ef&_e=0MT-PIf3jPix4LYT_VBYN1VfscP54aMsc69Qqup39n8n4cmr4MZKZTmzjWGra2OZWg7Mdo374TYx-Py2eReiBpEWuo6xTwMaZfzPt19hWNomG6OyNKMwXrFKlwa4Y-Vp-d8pHZg8ZfXS7lyykFi4b-0daoenzDcZE_YJvdE6pwxXtVQSKm9c3824HO_xe8fU92a-0eTvzB7dWw95gY-OWAQWTLh3mfhr9gaLOxL2SIBmSj4cB8Sn0Xt-TWRN2ocXVm_TFzMMLzZuHmQUUJ-n-2Df-061nhA6VCVYhfz5AYg3pUh3w2fgQQ3ixfUR1SBy1NP7m1516V1bH8gJCioUcuO4c7R-Jp7uwwe5vHsm3ic%3D)** _**The radical Left is continuing to deny there is a crisis. **_ And you and I know they’re blatantly lying to the American people about what’s really going on at the border. clean_body: Friend, you and I both know the federal government has a duty to secure our border and enforce immigration laws. And in Arizona, securing our borders is especially crucial. But the Democrats refuse to do their job. You may already be familiar with me, but I’ll reintroduce myself – I’m David Schweikert, and I’m staying committed to making sure Arizona’s border is secured – once and for all. The Biden-Harris administration has destroyed our border, eroded safety in our communities, and damaged our economy by opening the floodgates to millions of illegal immigrants. And not to mention Kamala Harris is the one “overseeing the border crisis” – even AFTER she openly pushed decriminalizing illegal crossings and open-door policies. The liberal media even admitted that the Department of Homeland Security under the Biden-Harris administration is granting 9 out of 10 illegal aliens entry to the United States. But you see, that statistic doesn’t account for the other THOUSANDS crossing our border undetected and unreported. The radical Left is continuing to deny there is a crisis. And you and I know they’re blatantly lying to the American people about what’s really going on at the border. That’s why I’m not going to sit idly by and let our country be overrun by socialism while Americans at home are suffering. And rest assured, with your help, I’ll continue the fight for strong border security– Thank you for your continued support. Sincerely, David Schweikert Arizona's Conservative | | | ---|--- | 2021 All Rights Reserved | 8175 E. Evans Rd., #13176 Scottsdale, AZ 85267 click to unsubscribe

clean_body: Can you give me a moment to explain why this is so important? = Hey Team, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign, but before I do, let me explain why this ask, especially now, is so important. Our finance team set this goal of raising $5,000 before the end of the month, because it’s where we need to be in order to win. This is one of the most competitive races in the country. We know the stakes are high, and we can’t afford to let up now. But, I can’t do it alone. I need your help to fund our grassroots campaign. We’re still about $2,928 short of our goal. We need to hit this goal so we can keep our momentum going into the summer months. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Your support means so much, Tom **Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. He believes Congress has a responsibility to put aside partisan politics and work together to solve the problems affecting America and Arizona. With your help, we can find solutions to the problems that Arizonans and Americans face today. = | ****=****** | To learn more, please visit and follow Tom on , , and . | Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress Tom O'Halleran, PO Box 63992, Phoenix, AZ 85082

name: Mark Kelly
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
I have an important ask to make ahead of our May fundraising deadline. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important.
On Monday, we’ll close the books on another deadline. It’s our latest opportunity to show our opponents that this campaign is moving full speed ahead. _But there’s also another reason why this is so important._
**This month, One Nation, a National Republican Super PAC, dropped a six-figure ad buy in Arizona against us. It’s the latest sign that National Republicans are willing to spend whatever it takes to try to win back this seat.**
We need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 50,000 contribution goal.
That is why I need your support today. Our opponents may have deep pockets, but we have something better...a team of people like you, who I know will always have my back.
**And if we can hit our 50,000 contribution goal, it’ll show that this team is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask:**
[**I’m humbly asking if you will make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign. The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 50,000 contribution goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210529-1-15&t=1&refcode2=696_6688874_pshQjE&akid=696%2E6688874%2EpshQjE)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210529-1-15&t=2&refcode2=696_6688874_pshQjE&akid=696%2E6688874%2EpshQjE) | [Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210529-1-15&t=3&refcode2=696_6688874_pshQjE&akid=696%2E6688874%2EpshQjE)
---|---
[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210529-1-15&t=4&refcode2=696_6688874_pshQjE&akid=696%2E6688874%2EpshQjE) | [Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210529-1-15&t=5&refcode2=696_6688874_pshQjE&akid=696%2E6688874%2EpshQjE)
---|---
[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210529-1-15&t=6&refcode2=696_6688874_pshQjE&akid=696%2E6688874%2EpshQjE) | [Other amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210529-1-15&t=7&refcode2=696_6688874_pshQjE&akid=696%2E6688874%2EpshQjE)
---|---
As you know, losing even one seat means losing the Senate.
I can’t thank you enough for all of the hard work you put into this campaign so far. I’m very thankful to be serving as Arizona’s Senator, and I look forward to working together with you to tackle all of the challenges that lie ahead in 2021 and beyond.
Thank you for all that you do,
— Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=8&akid=696%2E6688874%2EpshQjE).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.
