name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We’ve been digging through campaign finance reports, and what we found has us a little concerned.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210529-2146-header&t=1&akid=2146%2E2526796%2EU8L4Gy)
When we say we rely on grassroots funding more than anyone, we mean it. 82% of all the money we’ve raised has come from small-dollar donors. **That’s a higher percentage than anyone else — Republican or Democrat — in the House.** Our average donation is just $17, and we’re proud of that fact.
Grassroots fundraising power is our movement’s strongest advantage. But when we started digging into the latest campaign finance reports, we got a little concerned: Small-dollar donations to Democrats in the House dropped 62% last quarter.
We know it feels like we’re a million years away from the next election. It might even be tempting to step back from the activism and organizing that won us the 2018 and 2020 elections now that Democrats control Congress and the White House.
**But, we can’t afford to slow the pace this year.** Not only do we need to organize to protect our slim majorities in Congress, but we need to lay the groundwork to expand the number of progressives who will hold the line for a $15 minimum wage, the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and so much more.
**If small-dollar enthusiasm slows down, campaigns like ours who rely on grassroots support will be hurt the most.** That’s why it’s important that we hit every one of our monthly fundraising goals this year — and why we’re asking for your help today as we strive to reach our end-of-month goal of 15,000 contributions before Monday’s deadline.
[If you're able to today, can you please make a $3 donation right now to help our campaign reach this goal? In order to turn our power into policy, we can't afford to lose our momentum now. And, as we mentioned, no campaign relies on small-dollar donors more than ours.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210528-1?refcode=em20210529-2146-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2146_2526796_U8L4Gy&akid=2146%2E2526796%2EU8L4Gy)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210528-1?refcode=em20210529-2146-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2146_2526796_U8L4Gy&akid=2146%2E2526796%2EU8L4Gy)**
We are so grateful to each and every one of you for the role you play in this movement. Whether you’re phone banking, donating, or spreading the word on social media — it’s the work that you do that moves us forward.
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210528-1?refcode=em20210529-2146-P&t=23&refcode2=2146_2526796_U8L4Gy&akid=2146%2E2526796%2EU8L4Gy)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=2146%2E2526796%2EU8L4Gy) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=2146%2E2526796%2EU8L4Gy) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=2146%2E2526796%2EU8L4Gy)
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=2146%2E2526796%2EU8L4Gy)

name: Coach Lou Holtz
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is almost here!
body:
Dear Fellow American, You probably know me as the former head football coach of the Notre Dame Fighting Irish and the South Carolina Gamecocks. I am proud of my coaching career, but what you may not know is that before I went on to lead six different college football programs to bowl games, I served in the military. **In fact, military service runs in my family.** My father served during WWII – he fought in the Battle of Midway, Iwo Jima, and many of the major battles in the Pacific. He was one of the lucky ones, who returned celebrating victory, but many of his brothers in arms did not make it home. [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=abd52097153c4629b59beda1af92b27b&_e=RgiT-WEWz2qz0PJfGQQ4ou3f6gDqmxhBujrAPj3HlN9pWl1CU-w2ppdCh_hHaSwop-5zVGXnklnVnMuq_lX70-vSqv7INHR2BlNDvcS_jjDNMevHpJ1Wq0XEzyowDpeJtrEze9wWQRS2aSHRV3KgVWA0uk1yGSM26Udp-lXyD1YELJ-Rsx-U9ug_EpEbowVzIswq4SR74eELBBCE0gKaxugqJshSPyOUd-Pq_WxzoCRhYqCsWx6AzTrwPx_9IwCHMFkQiAU_bOjMt-AWMOK1EAJYh3SOEN3YGh7L1q13pxOes_0kDxTbpPoiL7rgw98uq2PbfPOclayL5X8uo7P1Tld3stCCmhOOrGZ7AMcxXy985cXkEiP6rwEMQrauGjI3Di6aq1m0I6MaOdSpNPvG48MfLXcLCPYhJnLGdFKTtG3iRYOYrjdzw5aB3ZjBbo_u) Me with Storekeeper 3rd Class Eric Davidson after signing a football for Davidson’s father. I visited the USS Abraham Lincoln to meet some of the men and women that are serving our country. Because of my father’s sacrifices and the values he taught me, I joined the Army where I served as an Army Field Artillery Officer. I learned so many lessons in the military which became the foundation of everything I did in life. [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=abd52097153c4629b59beda1af92b27b&_e=RgiT-WEWz2qz0PJfGQQ4ou3f6gDqmxhBujrAPj3HlN9pWl1CU-w2ppdCh_hHaSwop-5zVGXnklnVnMuq_lX70-vSqv7INHR2BlNDvcS_jjDNMevHpJ1Wq0XEzyowDpeJtrEze9wWQRS2aSHRV3KgVWA0uk1yGSM26Udp-lXyD1YELJ-Rsx-U9ug_EpEbowVzIswq4SR74eELBBCE0gKaxugqJshSPyOUd-Pq_WxzoCRJWa5usQ7mLywekF56WFbDAXIq-Ya9i11x2aQj3G6-lV9omaCp4GxgBA27fPc1YOhCE0iGFFEyKwpHxsuJ-YS-LgswmAbZfqYg70at4zfVgOGVBP75norfs4aKgf1kG_aP41Rj1PtqRplLPowngXmLN5N7leo89FvqsafqDgoPAd-X12axnwxUO3QQj-FjrkETDajUZvEl9eUbaiZmuV3A) Looking at a Purple Heart Wall during a tour of a hospital in Afghanistan But I wouldn’t have had the opportunity to do what I love – coach football for 44 years – if it weren’t for the brave men and women in our military who fought and died for our freedom to do what we love. I love this country. I love our freedom. And I love our way of life. But too often, we take these things for granted and forget the supreme sacrifice it took to secure these blessings. **[Which is why I am asking for your immediate support to honor these fallen heroes and inspire an American comeback after the isolating year we’ve all been through.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=abd52097153c4629b59beda1af92b27b&_e=RgiT-WEWz2qz0PJfGQQ4ou3f6gDqmxhBujrAPj3HlN9pWl1CU-w2ppdCh_hHaSwop-5zVGXnklnVnMuq_lX70-vSqv7INHR2BlNDvcS_jjDNMevHpJ1Wq0XEzyowDpeJtrEze9wWQRS2aSHRV3KgVWA0uk1yGSM26Udp-lXyD1YELJ-Rsx-U9ug_EpEbowVzIswq4SR74eELBBCE0gKaxugqJshSPyOUd-Pq_WxzoCRqm91w_RCoet8oLPrzifFkTKUHWK-K84Mvn-1euaF5ayrCD9UGbaaNCI-qcUWBqxqKEb0Ux0IijhdjgVll95tEULzwfhfUeZtgfN30uCzUZxXo9iKPqmpYzip-H3lV8lPCjN6WOWsXY0z9x86Eg4Et3Io2mQZ1AKx_WeJGpuJAufqwSGx1rJo9-wQSEf8IKnEUzF_4R7gfarjxyHkVo-cw)** It’s no secret that this past year has been incredibly challenging for all of us. I don’t know about you friend, but I am sick and tired of the “doom-and-gloom” headlines that I read in the paper every morning or turning on the news to hear about how bad and evil our country is. After all, it’s not like we haven’t been put through the wringer before... From our founding in 1776, to World War II, to 9/11 – our American identity has always been defined by what we do in difficult moments. And I believe that now is another one of those defining moments for our nation. That is why what my friends at the American Veterans Center (AVC) are doing is so important. They are leading America’s comeback by hosting the National Memorial Day Parade – titled Our Sacred Honor – to unite our country around the things that make America great. From the Revolutionary War to the War on Terror, millions of brave men and women have put their lives on the line to defend our American way of life. But over the years, too many of us have forgotten the true meaning of Memorial Day – it’s become just another day off work or a fun day for barbecues and swimming pools. That is why our magnificent country needs the National Memorial Day Parade: Our Sacred Honor now more than ever. clean_body: Dear Fellow American, You probably know me as the former head football coach of the Notre Dame Fighting Irish and the South Carolina Gamecocks. I am proud of my coaching career, but what you may not know is that before I went on to lead six different college football programs to bowl games, I served in the military. In fact, military service runs in my family. My father served during WWII – he fought in the Battle of Midway, Iwo Jima, and many of the major battles in the Pacific. He was one of the lucky ones, who returned celebrating victory, but many of his brothers in arms did not make it home. Me with Storekeeper 3rd Class Eric Davidson after signing a football for Davidson’s father. I visited the USS Abraham Lincoln to meet some of the men and women that are serving our country. Because of my father’s sacrifices and the values he taught me, I joined the Army where I served as an Army Field Artillery Officer. I learned so many lessons in the military which became the foundation of everything I did in life. Looking at a Purple Heart Wall during a tour of a hospital in Afghanistan But I wouldn’t have had the opportunity to do what I love – coach football for 44 years – if it weren’t for the brave men and women in our military who fought and died for our freedom to do what we love. I love this country. I love our freedom. And I love our way of life. But too often, we take these things for granted and forget the supreme sacrifice it took to secure these blessings. It’s no secret that this past year has been incredibly challenging for all of us. I don’t know about you friend, but I am sick and tired of the “doom-and-gloom” headlines that I read in the paper every morning or turning on the news to hear about how bad and evil our country is. After all, it’s not like we haven’t been put through the wringer before... From our founding in 1776, to World War II, to 9/11 – our American identity has always been defined by what we do in difficult moments. And I believe that now is another one of those defining moments for our nation. That is why what my friends at the American Veterans Center (AVC) are doing is so important. They are leading America’s comeback by hosting the National Memorial Day Parade – titled Our Sacred Honor – to unite our country around the things that make America great. From the Revolutionary War to the War on Terror, millions of brave men and women have put their lives on the line to defend our American way of life. But over the years, too many of us have forgotten the true meaning of Memorial Day – it’s become just another day off work or a fun day for barbecues and swimming pools. That is why our magnificent country needs the National Memorial Day Parade: Our Sacred Honor now more than ever. Not just to restore the true meaning of this special, commemorative holiday... But mainly because we need a COMEBACK! "" Not only will they be recording and broadcasting this special ceremony in front of our nation’s capital for millions of Americans to watch... But they will also be recording Memorial Day parades in cities throughout the country – as well as partnering with a handful of other veteran’s support organizations to lead America’s comeback and properly honor our fallen heroes. And believe me friend, I would not be asking for your financial support if I could help it. You see, the National Memorial Day Parade: Our Sacred Honor is the American Veterans Center's NUMBER ONE REVENUE source. Everything they do throughout the year – like recording the personal stories of our veterans to teaching our important history to the next generation of American leaders – relies on this one event. If you ask me, that’s a small price to pay to properly honor those who died defending our country, freedom, and way of life. I hope I hear back from you very soon. Warmest regards, Coach Lou Holtz P.S. If you’ve ever attended, watched on TV, or heard about this parade before, then you know that it is the nation’s largest and most beloved Memorial Day celebration. But this year’s will be more spectacular than ever before. I’m not supposed to spoil the surprise, but this year the Air Force Thunderbirds and Navy Blue Angels will be performing a special “Super Delta” formation for the first time EVER – exclusively for the National Memorial Day Parade. P.P.S. The Thunderbirds and Blue Angels won’t be the only ones joining this special celebration of our veterans. Alongside them will be the crew of the USS Constitution, the West Point Band, the U.S. Marine Corp Silent Drill Platoon, and military & veterans’ units from bases all over the country. Virtually every U.S. veteran and Armed Service member is counting on this parade to go on. Thank you in advance for your generous support. The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. | | | | ---|---|--- © American Veterans Center | 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: Alex Padilla
subject: Something I’m incredibly proud of
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

$3 before midnight.

That’s the amount I am humbly asking you to contribute ahead of our May
fundraising deadline on Monday.

I know that our team has sent a few emails about this deadline in recent
days — and for good reason. The fact is that the vast majority of the
money we raise to fuel this grassroots campaign comes from lots and lots
of folks like you making small-dollar contributions when they can.

That’s a fact I’m incredibly proud of — but it also means from time to
time I have to directly ask:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may21/?refcode=em210529-1-full&t=1001&refcode2=56_159979_S1XfKH&akid=56%2E159979%2ES1XfKH ]Can you please add a contribution of $3 or to our
grassroots campaign before Monday’s midnight deadline? We’re still a bit
short of our 2,500 contribution May fundraising goal we set and your
support is essential if we’re going to get there.

Our fight to reform the immigration system, tackle climate change by
passing a Green New Deal, and ensure access to quality and affordable
health care by passing Medicare for All means there are a lot of powerful
interests who want to stop us.

But that’s okay because I believe this team is ready to put in the work
during the tough fights ahead.

And I am so thankful to know we’re in this together.

Thank you in advance for chipping in!

Warmly,

—Alex

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may21?source=em210529-1-full&t=1002&refcode2=56_159979_S1XfKH&akid=56%2E159979%2ES1XfKH ]DONATE NOW

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.alex-padilla.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=56%2E159979%2ES1XfKH

Jamie,

**Everyone deserves to have their voice heard.** That’s why conservatives in Georgia passed common sense reforms to ensure that every legal vote gets counted.

name: Lauren Lalonde, PramilaForCongress.com
subject: About this summer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Here's the deal, Peter —
Summer is a notoriously difficult time for fundraising, especially during an “off-year” (even though we know that there aren’t really any off-years when you’re building a powerful movement that fights for the people). And after a year as challenging as this one, I can’t blame you if campaigns are the last thing on your mind right now.
But with so much on the line for our people-first movement, we can’t afford to slow down. **So we have two options:**
1. Either more people than usual need to chip in before the end of the month to help us hit our $55,000 May goal
2. Or, we need to revisit our overall budget and slow down some of our important organizing work at a pivotal moment

[**Most first-time donors give about $5. Will you please make a contribution of $10 or whatever you can afford to help us hit our goal before midnight on Monday?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2774?refcode=em20210529-333&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=333%2E420207%2EMZVhaJ)
**[Donate $10](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2774?refcode=em20210529-333&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=333%2E420207%2EMZVhaJ)**
Every donation — $3, $10, or $27 — helps fuel Pramila’s continued push for transformative change in Congress. And she relies 100% on people like you stepping up.
Thank you for making a gift today,
Lauren Lalonde
Finance Director
Pramila for Congress

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210529-333-footer&t=25&refcode2=333_420207_MZVhaJ&akid=333%2E420207%2EMZVhaJ)**

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Fellow American,

I’m Senator Rick Scott from Florida – and for the next two years I have the honor of serving as the chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee. My job is to win back the Senate and get you excited about Republican candidates across the country. I'm leaning on one man in particular to help us get the job done: **President Trump**.

Big-Tech and the Liberal mob have done everything they can to censor President Trump. They banned him on Twitter and Facebook and tried to silence him. **But now, Donald Trump is starting up rallies this June!**

As a loyal Republican, we know that you would want to be the first to hear this news!

So, if you are willing to attend one of his electric rallies, **[let us know!](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1e346b44b3bb416d8caf4ed4badd7d0b&_e=KFAnRhtA0Y7AaQPjyhVYdEkt_b1LfUCbZg76eixFXlhB7b3P5g1Xz98WWOvOngXVEnIa7Ovy5NuSN0VhAOs5TGsB8uh2sDhdNO1Ou7-hbl5TkvV0SJS6O_wYsIssdCY-L0l_SgKQnSjKEh6bgeYmCQDXnUTp5IQ79MkwL7SjyK0GSv2Pel57qoROOvArPnu1iSxFwsZDRwgUsSLRBon_uXk9X0SI-zBezPyHJJGTMEmMouRl5iUsjbquNTkFg31VxVZQ9ErbYxAkYMGAVSyxIPZ_5cDuAdSl_PYPLXHlKAMRiI22xFzbs5hr2Mpx7JMSQvYWHmDLGT_perFLW56ifvanXwDjMkINPlra6jQjiZBMtBcz0GzLbI6c81ucM5_yjV5u07mQwofsBYB3XfKWzAC7ndjhj9b15UpL36Z2yhM%3D)**

name: Erica Smith
subject: re: A little more about my life and our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Not going to pretend like $7,000 isn’t a lot of money.
#
Hi y'all, it’s Erica.
I’m not going to sit here and pretend like $7,000 isn’t a lot of money. But the truth is, that’s the amount we absolutely must raise online by May 31 in order to keep building our campaign in June.
Asking for support when you have a funding goal like this is never not uncomfortable. [**_So I wanted to tell you more about my life and our campaign before I ask you to make a donation to our scrappy, unapologetic, AWESOME campaign for U.S. Senate in North Carolina._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2149?refcode=em20210529-124&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=124%2E3698%2E84bpz3)
**I’m Erica Smith.** I’m an engineer, educator, minister, and three-term state senator. Growing up on a family farm was difficult, and so was growing up Black in the South. But our elders taught us the dignity of work and the value of faith.
I was raised on a dirt road in rural North Carolina — the same dirt road that my mother was raised on on. My five siblings and I grew up picking cucumbers and corn on the farm. Now it’s 2021, and **my mother still lives on the same dirt road, waiting for it to be paved.**
In fact, here I am standing on that dirt road just the other day.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2149?refcode=em20210529-124&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=124%2E3698%2E84bpz3)
All across North Carolina and America, good people are waiting on their roads to be paved. We are waiting for affordable health care, waiting for a liveable wage, and waiting for a representative who understands what it means to struggle, and who will fight for transformative change.
We can be that change, y'all. I’m running for U.S. Senate to create opportunities for communities like mine. **Together we can win a liveable wage, a Green New Deal, guaranteed single-payer health care, and so much more.**
If elected, I will fight like hell for North Carolina — and I’d be the first Black woman to ever represent the state on a federal level.
[**_If you’re with me, will you please consider making a donation of $5 to our campaign for U.S. Senate? By donating, you’re taking a personal stake in our historic, progressive campaign for U.S. Senate._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2149?refcode=em20210529-124&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=124%2E3698%2E84bpz3)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2149?refcode=em20210529-124&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=124%2E3698%2E84bpz3)**
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210529-124-footer&t=23&refcode2=124_3698_84bpz3&akid=124%2E3698%2E84bpz3)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=124%2E3698%2E84bpz3)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=124%2E3698%2E84bpz3)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Susan Wild
subject: Your support means a lot to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
I know we can win. We’ve faced these odds before. But we’re going to need every single grassroots dollar we can get in order to defend this House seat.

| Peter,

I hope you’ll give me a moment of your time to let me explain why I’m [_**asking you to chip in $25 to my re-election campaign today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29966216/288071788/-563716641?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210529-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmZkYzU1OS1jYWMwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xeGt5z9_eMVYetr6v0ljkgbdkmwjjAtryAn25fSE7lM=)

A lot happened in our campaign recently. We learned that one of my multiple Republican opponents (yes, there’s already multiple!) kickstarted her campaign with $500,000 of her personal wealth, putting us at a disadvantage despite a good first quarter.

Then, the Cook Political Report identified PA-07 as an EVEN split between Democrats and Republicans in their 2021 analysis - rating this district as even more competitive than it was in 2020.

I know we can win. We’ve faced these odds before. But we’re going to need every single grassroots dollar we can get in order to defend this House seat.

We have a big End of Month deadline in 2 days. It’s important we show our strength early on, or Republicans will think we are vulnerable.

[_**Will you chip in $25 (or anything you can) to my re-election campaign today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29966217/288071789/-563716641?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210529-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmZkYzU1OS1jYWMwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xeGt5z9_eMVYetr6v0ljkgbdkmwjjAtryAn25fSE7lM=)

Your support means the world to me,

_Susan Wild_

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: please
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
I need to give you 2 critical updates: 1. We’re hours away from the New Mexico Special Election to fill Deb Haaland’s open Congressional seat. 2. Republicans are doubling down on last-minute attacks to take this seat from us.
I don’t say this lightly: This race is a top priority for us. I will not allow Republicans to take this seat and derail our Majority -- but I’m facing a critical budget gap. I need 50,000 of my best Democrats to step up with $14, help Democrats WIN, and DEFEND our incredible Majority. Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.

name: Megan Simpson, Team Sarah
subject: Wanted to connect
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Peter -- I'm Megan, Sarah's campaign manager. It's my job to work closely with Sarah and the rest of our team to map out a plan to flip this Senate seat to say goodbye to Ron Johnson once and for all.

A big part of my job is working with our finance team to ensure we're on track to hit our goals -- and let me explain why that's so important (or if you're already on board, you can chip in [**here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29968711/288078882/-49048448?gpsid=50_130_19077&refcode=em21_210529_EOM6_fnd_gq_act__ms_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210529_EOM6_fnd_gq_act__ms_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODA2MmFmZi1kOWMwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PexDNn4pZtbhHABayrvu2LozqHbLiU2nF0M_XasPEwU=)).

Our campaign is people-powered -- we won't accept even a dime of corporate PAC money.

Instead, we're relying on everyday people to help us keep the lights on and the campaign running. Your donations help us buy gas so Sarah can travel the state, run our online advertising program, and expand our campaign team. The money raised by an email like this one directly affects our budget. But when we fall short, we have to start thinking about making hard cuts.

I'm going to level with you: thinking about budget cuts two months into a campaign isn't what we want to do, especially when _Inside Elections_ is calling Wisconsin a battleground race. Too much is on the line to fall short.

Now, this email isn't all bad news: I just got off the phone with our finance director, Ellie, and she told me that if 95 people chip in on this email, we'll be in a good place to hit our $15,000 end-of-month goal by midnight tomorrow!

[**Will you step up right away and pitch in $5, or whatever you can, right now? Every dollar gets us one step closer to closing our fundraising gap.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29968713/288078884/-49048448?gpsid=50_130_19077&refcode=em21_210529_EOM6_fnd_gq_act__ms_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210529_EOM6_fnd_gq_act__ms_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODA2MmFmZi1kOWMwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PexDNn4pZtbhHABayrvu2LozqHbLiU2nF0M_XasPEwU=)

I hope we can count on your continued support.

Thank you,

Megan

Megan Simpson
Campaign Manager
Team Sarah

| Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. If you're ready to step up and join this grassroots team, make a contribution today. | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29968714/288078885/-49048448?gpsid=50_130_19077&refcode=em21_210529_EOM6_fnd_gq_act__ms_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210529_EOM6_fnd_gq_act__ms_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODA2MmFmZi1kOWMwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PexDNn4pZtbhHABayrvu2LozqHbLiU2nF0M_XasPEwU=)

clean_body: re: our Democratic Majority | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Experts declared our Democrat, Dr. Raul Ruiz, is officially running in a Swing District. It’s one of the most competitive districts in the country! Far-right Republicans announced they’re targeting Dr. Ruiz to DEFEAT next year. We’re launching a brand-new to help Dr. Ruiz grow his voter outreach efforts and protect our Democratic Majority. [But we need [500] donations before midnight tomorrow or we won’t be able to fully fund our campaign operation. Please, chip in whatever you can right away:]() | | | | | | | Look: We don’t want to unnecessarily worry you or deliver bad news. In fact, thanks to hard work from folks like you, Dr. Ruiz and our Democrats in Congress have been able to make AMAZING progress: \-- We passed COVID-19 relief and we’re conquering this virus, one shot at a time. \-- We unveiled a major plan to rebuild our crumbling infrastructure. \-- And we’re committed to getting to the bottom of what happened on January 6th. But we also have to be realistic: Unfortunately, the party who wins the Presidency usually loses the House in the next election. | | | | | | Together, \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. name: Giffords.org
subject: $5 might not seem like a lot
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends, we are going to be upfront with our ask — we are emailing for $5.
[**Click here if you don’t have time to read anymore but still want to chip in $5 to help us pass universal background checks >>**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21&amount=5&refcode=em210529-2-subs?t=1&refcode2=153_3935704_XCgt-A&akid=153%2E3935704%2EXCgt-A)
The end of the month is less than two days away and we created a 10,000 contribution goal for the month of May to help urge the Senate to pass universal background checks.
We didn’t just come up with a random number — we’ve calculated that 10,000 contributions is the amount of support we need to show the Senate that Americans want action on universal background checks right now.
$5 might not seem like a lot. But when you chip in $5, and the next person reading this email chips in $5 too, we’ll have the resources to hit our goal and do our part.
You can see how important your support is, which is why we have to ask:
[**If you are able, will you make a $5 donation today to help us hit our 10,000 donation May fundraising goal? Your support, regardless of the amount, will go a long way towards helping us save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21&amount=5&refcode=em210529-2-subs?t=2&refcode2=153_3935704_XCgt-A&akid=153%2E3935704%2EXCgt-A)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Every $5 donation you make is a statement that says we want Congress to pass universal background checks as soon as possible.
Saving lives and preventing gun violence is our mission here at Giffords. And we wouldn’t be able to do this work without your support, so thank you.
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?refcode=em210529-2-subs&t=21&refcode2=153_3935704_XCgt-A&akid=153%2E3935704%2EXCgt-A)**

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.

clean_body: We’re so close, Peter. | Peter, We wouldn’t bother you if it weren’t important, but this situation is absolutely critical. We can’t afford to let the Democrats out-raise us, Peter. If we fall short, the Left will have a huge advantage. | | | | | | Republicans are going to be challenging the Left in hundreds of House districts and Senate battlegrounds across the nation. But in order to remain competitive across the map, we need Grassroots Republicans (like you) to step up in a big way and fund this fight. Right now, we’re still $113,232 short of our May Fundraising Goal -- and we need your help if we’re going to close the gap in time. | | | | | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Bad News
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends — we have some bad news and some good news.
**The bad news is:** This month, One Nation, a Mitch McConnell-backed Super PAC, dropped a six-figure ad buy in Arizona attacking us. It’s the latest sign that National Republicans are willing to spend whatever it takes to try to win back this seat.
**The good news is:** We’ve been here before! We know how to defeat opposition with deep pockets. We learned last year that this team can show up for Mark, chip in small amounts at a time, and still go up against some of the most powerful dark money groups and WIN.
**This campaign has always been powered by generous folks like you who give $5, $10 or even $25 to emails just like this. So if you can, please consider making a donation today before our May fundraising deadline on Monday, it would mean so much.**
[**Click here to make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign! We’ll put your contribution right to work in our efforts to defend Mark and hold this seat in 2022.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210529-2-15&t=1&refcode2=701_6688874_Si42Lg&akid=701%2E6688874%2ESi42Lg)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210529-2-15&t=2&refcode2=701_6688874_Si42Lg&akid=701%2E6688874%2ESi42Lg) | [Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210529-2-15&t=3&refcode2=701_6688874_Si42Lg&akid=701%2E6688874%2ESi42Lg)
---|---
[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210529-2-15&t=4&refcode2=701_6688874_Si42Lg&akid=701%2E6688874%2ESi42Lg) | [Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210529-2-15&t=5&refcode2=701_6688874_Si42Lg&akid=701%2E6688874%2ESi42Lg)
---|---
[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210529-2-15&t=6&refcode2=701_6688874_Si42Lg&akid=701%2E6688874%2ESi42Lg) | [Other amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210529-2-15&t=7&refcode2=701_6688874_Si42Lg&akid=701%2E6688874%2ESi42Lg)
---|---
We’re confident that with your help we will be able to stay on track to hit our 50,000 contribution May fundraising goal so we can organize and prepare for the fight to keep Mark in the Senate.
Thank you in advance for pitching in and for having Mark’s back!
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210529-2-15&t=8&refcode2=701_6688874_Si42Lg&akid=701%2E6688874%2ESi42Lg)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=9&akid=701%2E6688874%2ESi42Lg).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Cox=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Weekly Beast: Newsom’s Buying Votes With $1.5 Million 💰
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Cox for Governor 2021, Inc3525 Del Mar Heights Rd # 1077San Diego, CA 92130-2199
body:
This week, Gavin’s giveaway has added up to an all-time high and he's handing out over $100 million to incentivize voters to get vaccinated. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a59d657f08b9/8jt85jsn9d-4924322?e=b8a6795190)
---
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=e1ebbcaca8&e=b8a6795190)
| [Donate Now](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=d048de7a9c&e=b8a6795190)
---
# Gavin’s Spending Spree Continues
This week, Gavin’s giveaway has added up to an all-time high. Newsom framed his bloated budget as a benefit of a surplus. Californians, however, understand that this **“surplus” is just another word for the taxes he’s collected from hard-working Californians**.
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=943be0cc9f&e=b8a6795190)
Now Gavin’s throwing money at his constituents, offering to [forgive traffic fines and pay people’s rent](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=9469473d34&e=b8a6795190). And instead of addressing California's most pressing issues, like homelessness and the water crisis, Newsom is handing out over [$100 million](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=9c1f415b70&e=b8a6795190) **to incentivize voters with $1.5 million cash prizes to get vaccinated.** But Californians are starting to see Gavin’s handout for what it really is: he’s betting taxpayer dollars on his recall survival and buying votes any way he can. **Newsom’s already burned through $267.8 billion** **in spending**. If only it was coming from his wallet instead of yours.
|
---
### In a release on Thursday, John Cox made the following statement:
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=eed483f6fd&e=b8a6795190)
|
---
### To drive the point home, John posted this on Twitter:
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=a0694726f2&e=b8a6795190)
|
---
## $1.35 Million Church Settlement and Lawsuit Over Early Release of Felons
Perhaps Newsom’s handouts are also an attempt to distract voters from his [**$1.35 million settlement with a Los Angeles-area church**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=5cf166520a&e=b8a6795190)**over violating their right to worship** , or the lawsuit brought on by 44 of the state’s 58 district attorneys over the [**76,000 violent inmates that he is releasing from prison early**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=715a143e81&e=b8a6795190).
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=70c593495f&e=b8a6795190)
## Newsom's Budget Officials Asked Counties to Fast-track Recall Cost Estimates
And in case the voters weren’t already convinced that Newsom is worried about the outcome of the recall, the [**expedited budget request that could shorten the recall timeline**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=2ac127dbd8&e=b8a6795190) should remove all doubt.
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=a38a81e564&e=b8a6795190)
## San Diego Republican Women Discuss BEASTLY Changes Needed in California
John visited with the Republican Women of South Bay and the La Jolla Republican Women’s Club this week. These women are dedicated patriots **who understand that we need change ASAP to fix our failing state**.
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f1a44bbfdc&e=b8a6795190)
|
---
## We Need Your Support
Gavin Newsom has been taking a beating lately, both in the courtroom and in the polls. There’s a reason why checks from his [megadonors ](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=c1910a017c&e=b8a6795190)are stacking up. **It will take people like you to help stop this madness in California and save our state**.
| [Donate Now](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=e457379142&e=b8a6795190)
---
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=b647b6aab1&e=b8a6795190)
### [VoteForTheBeast.com](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=9904e94752&e=b8a6795190)
| | | | [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f3613d22f1&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=80dfaec0f8&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=7b10c1cfba&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=41e84c55db&e=b8a6795190)
---|---|---|---
## [About the Beast](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=3ab8db2258&e=b8a6795190)
John is a businessman - **a self-made political outsider** \- with big plans to **shake-up Sacramento** and cut taxes to save California.As someone who **doesn't owe the establishment anything** , John will work for the people of California to cut taxes, eliminate homelessness, make housing more affordable, and get our kids back in school.**California is out of control thanks to career politicians** and insiders who look out for their own interests, rather than those of the average Californian.John built his business from the ground up and **understands the needs of Californians in a way the career politicians who are running this state into the ground never will**. John’s had to scratch and claw to survive and succeed, and he's ready to fight for you.
| | | Paid for by John Cox for Governor 2021, Inc3525 Del Mar Heights Rd # 1077San Diego, CA 92130-2199

subject: We'll keep this brief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
We'll get right to it, Peter.

Our end-of-month deadline is rapidly approaching and we're still $5,674 short of our $20,000 goal. This is the first deadline we've faced since a Republican opponent jumped into the race, so we can't afford to come up short.

With Democrats holding only a slim five-seat majority in the House, we know national Republicans and our opponent will do -- and spend -- whatever it takes to flip Kim's seat and take back the House. We need to be prepared now to fight back, and it starts with hitting our end-of-month goal.

map!") on our website and **MAGA********Nation** is stepping up! If you support our conservative, pro-life, pro-Trump, America First campaign for U.S. Senate, please take a moment to add your name to the map [**here**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=hvw5smsGZmC0zsVkF6hKG6IAoZTCnP7t4ZwFsRajdfp6eW-e20e9ws97e7ifSuGZg5SxjBNzyUi1EWCl7LiBvw&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=endorsement_map&n=3 "Click here to add your name."). [](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=hvw5smsGZmC0zsVkF6hKG6IAoZTCnP7t4ZwFsRajdfp6eW-e20e9ws97e7ifSuGZg5SxjBNzyUi1EWCl7LiBvw&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=endorsement_map&n=4 "Click here to add your name!") [**We’ve set an ambitious goal to collect 1,000+ endorsements from grassroots patriots like YOU, before the end of the month, and it’s been a ton of fun watching new submissions pour in.**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=hvw5smsGZmC0zsVkF6hKG6IAoZTCnP7t4ZwFsRajdfp6eW-e20e9ws97e7ifSuGZg5SxjBNzyUi1EWCl7LiBvw&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=endorsement_map&n=5 "Will you help us hit our goal?") _**I sure hope I’ll see your name soon!**_ The Socialists in Washington absolutely **HATE** to see conservatives come together and coalesce around the America First agenda, and that’s exactly what this campaign is all about. Let’s work together to **FLIP** the Senate, **TAKE BACK** the House, and **SAVE** our country from Biden’s disastrous reign! [](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=hvw5smsGZmC0zsVkF6hKG6IAoZTCnP7t4ZwFsRajdfp6eW-e20e9ws97e7ifSuGZg5SxjBNzyUi1EWCl7LiBvw&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=endorsement_map&n=6 "Click here to add your name!")For America, Mo Brooks
P.S. -- Once you’ve [**added your name to the map**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=hvw5smsGZmC0zsVkF6hKG6IAoZTCnP7t4ZwFsRajdfp6eW-e20e9ws97e7ifSuGZg5SxjBNzyUi1EWCl7LiBvw&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=endorsement_map&n=7 "Add your name to the map here!"), send the link around to your friends and family, let’s fill this thing up and send a message to the Socialist Squad that the MAGA Movement is Mobilizing! P.P.S. -- Don’t fret if your name doesn’t appear right away, we’ve had some trolls attempt to say all sorts of nasty things about me and President Trump, so our team is reviewing each submission before it goes live. _**If you check back in a few days, your name *will* be there!**_

body:
This is why tonight’s deadline is so critical! Read more >>
Peter, _Our May fundraising deadline is TONIGHT, and**[we’re still looking for 15 more supporters to donate right now](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/eec7676212a71f11/a7734caa86a510ffc3d6b838967d376c/34943)**._ Kevin has been pounding the pavement up and down the state, spreading his message and plan for a California Comeback. **He is the ONLY candidate in the race with an actual plan to fix the things Newsom has broken.** His tax plan includes the largest middle-class tax cut in California history, tax-free retirement for veterans, and it directly addresses the skyrocketing cost of living here. Yet just this last week, we got a picture of what we’re up against in this race. Gavin Newsom got a huge campaign boost from a Netflix CEO ($3 million boost!)— the perfect example of both the Hollywood elites and Big Tech propping up his campaign. That’s why this deadline is so important, and why we’ve reached out so many times for your help. We need you and others to help fuel our campaign with grassroots support! **Help us reach our goal by MIDNIGHT tonight? **
_**⬇️ DONATE NOW! ⬇️**_ [**RUSH $25 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/eec7676212a71f11/bc6693e23f7c6dc3c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**RUSH $50 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/eec7676212a71f11/794c6d90cf9637dac3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**RUSH $100 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/eec7676212a71f11/445819be40970e5cc3d6b838967d376c/34943) Thank you so much for your help in defeating the broken status quo in California and electing a REAL leader who knows how to fix it! For California and our future,
Stephen Puetz, Campaign Manager | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/eec7676212a71f11/9980151483682e2bc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/eec7676212a71f11/188966646558899bc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/eec7676212a71f11/ffa0d1ae93b0de96c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/eec7676212a71f11/eb0319423e61dc16c3d6b838967d376c/34943)
